name: Spacer
description: Flex-grow spacer that pushes siblings apart.

api.name: Spacer
api.description: Flex-grow spacer that pushes siblings apart.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Tailwind size token (e.g. "4", "px"). When set, renders a fixed-size square spacer. When unset, renders a flex-grow spacer that fills available space along the parent flex axis.

parameters.name: Orientation
parameters.description: Hints which axis the parent flex container uses so the grow-spacer collapses to zero on the cross-axis instead of expanding it. Default Horizontal keeps the historical behaviour (flex-1 inside a row). Switch to Vertical when the parent is a column stack — without it, the spacer's flex-1 took width from the column instead of pushing siblings to opposite ends.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div.

examples.title: Fixed Size
examples.code:
<Stack Direction="Lumeo.Orientation.Horizontal" Align="center">
    <Avatar />
    <Spacer Size="4" />
    <Stack Gap="0">
        <Text Weight="medium" Size="sm">Jane Doe</Text>
        <Text Color="muted" Size="xs">jane@example.com</Text>
    </Stack>
</Stack>

examples.title: Vertical Grow Spacer
examples.code:
<Stack Direction="Lumeo.Orientation.Vertical" Class="h-48">
    <Text Weight="semibold">Header</Text>
    <Spacer Orientation="Lumeo.Orientation.Vertical" />
    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">Footer action</Button>
</Stack>

mdSummary:
# Spacer

Flex-grow spacer that pushes siblings apart.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/spacer

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Spacer | Size | `string?` | `` | Tailwind size token (e.g. "4", "px"). When set, renders a fixed-size square spacer. When unset, renders a flex-grow spacer that fills available space along the parent flex axis. |
| Spacer | Orientation | `Lumeo.Orientation` | `Lumeo.Orientation.Horizontal` | Hints which axis the parent flex container uses so the grow-spacer collapses to zero on the cross-axis instead of expanding it. Default Horizontal keeps the historical behaviour (flex-1 inside a row). Switch to Vertical when the parent is a column stack — without it, the spacer's flex-1 took width from the column instead of pushing siblings to opposite ends. |
| Spacer | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div. |
| Spacer | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary\<string, object\>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div. |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects

## Services it injects

## Example

